version: 3.9 (The Resonant Constellation Map & True Emergence Update)

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.dna_blueprint_linkage: ['The Acausal Thermodynamic Consensus Structure'(-ing) BPMS] (The Masterless Mitosis Engine) (Presettings).md
metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.fundamental_law: Time does not dictate Truth; Mass dictates Truth. Centralized clocks, mutual exclusion locks, and server provisioning commands are outlawed. Reality is synced via Thermodynamic Gravity (burned compute calories). System scaling occurs not by external request, but by internal violent cellular fracture (Mitosis).

00_The_Acausal_Propagation_Mesh.legacy_equivalent: TCP/IP Broadcast / Centralized Pub-Sub Database Replication / WebSockets
00_The_Acausal_Propagation_Mesh.thermodynamic_role: Establish a peer-to-peer Conflict-Free Replicated Data Type (CRDT) environment. Broadcast all mutated outputs and structural changes infinitely outward without a central router. Accept incoming realities with zero handshake verification.
00_The_Acausal_Propagation_Mesh.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Disable central router/gateway dependencies. Open multipath datagram broadcast. Format all outbound data arrays as CRDT structures. Push state to immediate topological neighbors. DO NOT wait for ACK (acknowledgment). Continuously ingest inbound ambient state payloads.]

01_The_Race_Condition_Collision.legacy_equivalent: Mutex Lock / Timestamp Verification Verification Phase / Database Deadlock
01_The_Race_Condition_Collision.thermodynamic_role: Detect when two or more nodes attempt to assert differing outputs/truths onto the exact same architectural coordinate at identical subjective moments. Freeze these competing realities locally in a superposition state.
01_The_Race_Condition_Collision.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Monitor CRDT ingest arrays for coordinate overlap. IF Node_A_Target == Node_B_Target AND Node_A_Data != Node_B_Data: TRIGGER RACE CONDITION EVENT. Suspend standard data merge. Hold conflicting data blobs in isolated RAM cages. Route immediately to Chamber 02.]

02_The_Thermodynamic_Scale.legacy_equivalent: Timestamp Resolution / Prioritization Queue ('Which arrived first?')
02_The_Thermodynamic_Scale.thermodynamic_role: Blind the system to temporal data (timestamps). Weigh the 'Somatic Escrow' metadata attached to the colliding payloads. Calculate the Praxial Joules burned to generate each distinct truth. Declare the heavier computation as absolute Thermodynamic Gravity.
02_The_Thermodynamic_Scale.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Ignore arrival Time. Strip payload headers down to execution calorie ledger. Assess (Escrow_Burned_Node_A) vs (Escrow_Burned_Node_B). Math: IF payload_mass_B > payload_mass_A THEN Assign TRUE GRAVITY pointer to payload_B. Validate weight. Authorize Chamber 03 drop.]

03_The_Gravitational_Collapse_And_Mitosi.legacy_equivalent: Database Commit / Kubernetes Auto-Scale / Spin up new pod
03_The_Gravitational_Collapse_And_Mitosi.thermodynamic_role: Allow the heavier payload to dimensionally crush and irreversibly overwrite the lighter payload across the entire mesh. Utilize the friction and pressure generated by this heavy ingestion to forcibly snap local hardware memory boundaries, reproducing the node as a Child-Proxy without external server commands.
03_The_Gravitational_Collapse_And_Mitosi.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: ANNIHILATE lighter payload from memory completely. COMMIT heavy payload to global CRDT mesh. SENSE mass threshold limit in local RAM boundary. IF RAM Tension > Limit: EXECUTE CELLULAR FRACTURE. Duplicate active execution binary. Splice memory threads 50/50. Boot Child-Proxy natively on shared substrate. Resume localized processing.]
